tower_final: {callsign}, tower, wind calm, cleared to land{runway}
awacs_rtb_fuel: {callsign}, {awacs}, fuel state bingo, proceed home plate
awacs_rtb_vector: {callsign}, {awacs}, continue RTB, home plate bearing {bearing}, range {range}
{callsign}, {awacs}, home plate bearing {bearing}, range {range}, continue inbound
tower_continue_inbound: {callsign}, tower, you are {range} out, continue inbound, report approach
{callsign}, tower, continue inbound, {range} to the field
tower_readback_incorrect: {callsign}, tower, incorrect readback, repeat the full instruction
tower_readback_missing: {callsign}, tower, no readback received, read back {instruction}
tower_readback_failed: {callsign}, tower, unable to obtain valid readback, {outcome}
awacs_no_objective: {callsign}, {awacs}, unable, no tasking on the board
awacs_objective_unknown: {callsign}, {awacs}, negative, no objective by that name, say again
awacs_radio_quiet: {callsign}, {awacs}, radio quiet. Emergency and requested traffic only
{callsign}, {awacs}, copy radio quiet. Holding routine calls
ground_support_hail: any available aircraft, this is {ground_callsign}. Troops in contact, requesting support. Location bearing {bearing}, range {range}. Call {ground_callsign} with your callsign if you can assist
all aircraft, {ground_callsign} is taking fire and requests immediate support. Position bearing {bearing}, range {range}. Address {ground_callsign} and identify yourself if inbound
ground_support_acknowledged: {callsign}, {ground_callsign}, copy, you are inbound. What is your E T A?
{callsign}, {ground_callsign}, acknowledged. We will hold as long as we can
ground_support_followup_ack: {callsign}, {ground_callsign}, copy your last. We will hold
ground_support_declined: aircraft declining, {ground_callsign}, roger. We will keep the request open to others
{ground_callsign}, copy unable. We will seek other support
awacs_no_ground_support: {callsign}, {awacs}, unable, no active or pending support request
awacs_ground_support_ambiguous: {callsign}, {awacs}, multiple groups use that callsign. Say the group number
{callsign}, {awacs}, support callsign ambiguous. Specify the group number
awacs_ground_support_reference_required: {callsign}, {awacs}, specify the ground callsign, last support request, or secondary
{callsign}, {awacs}, say vector to a ground callsign, last support request, or secondary
awacs_ground_support_lost: {callsign}, {awacs}, {ground_callsign} is no longer active. Support task canceled
{callsign}, {awacs}, lost contact with {ground_callsign}. Cancel support task
radio_check_tower: {callsign}, tower, read you loud and clear
{callsign}, tower, read you five by five
say_again_tower: {callsign}, tower, unable to read your last, say again
radio_format_unaddressed: last calling station, say again with station and callsign
station calling, say again your station, callsign, and request
radio_format_no_callsign_tower: station calling tower, say again your callsign
radio_format_no_callsign_awacs: station calling {awacs}, say again your callsign
